name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: FW: State of the Union Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
President Trump needs your thoughts. |
---
| | | | | | |

Friend,

Only YOU can truly describe the current state of our country.

That's why the President needs to hear from you IMMEDIATELY before he puts the final touches on his first State of the Union Address.

No Democrat can keep President Trump from telling the TRUTH about not only the State of Our Union, but also the CRISIS at our Southern Border.

He is taking the stage to be the VOICE of YOU -- the American people.

**[Please take the Official State of the Union Prep Survey before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so President Trump can review your answers.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f1d664831a46b9a15806822bc1875080c045dafba6218932be8b6f73bee8d377ac2bd9d543558c6bd02da6b87f8eb3fd1)**
| **[Official State of the Union Prep Survey](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260fd2f26b7af4cffbf119b79984be521b8cf0ae5776e9ed04984cb30e482d1118769d5002df4f048a515f8ea987c68ccc6b)**
---
**1\. Do you approve of the job done by President Donald J. Trump?**| | [Answer](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f007af623980f2c5ca5fc2a2e3b179a6fe3b9b1ccf803746e2cdf73d3fbe65b3308e632e3607bdc018060963f70dea4b3)
---
**2\. Do you believe the media has painted a false image of what 's happening at our Southern Border?**| | [Answer](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260fa5acee47fa64f697085412fb9e5766f6e1711aaecfd873d2638f1ce9d37ff62322326acaa7ed220d927e81eafa134b8d)
---
**3\. Do you think the media did a proper job of blaming Democrats for the Shutdown?**| | [Answer](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f8489b45b44d25c5591bc3609396b8eb1ac3822393f1e25be91524fc64611c650723e8f33b8178d0c0ef056c665d4861b)
---
**4\. Do you think news outlets should be held accountable for writing FALSE stories?**| | [Answer](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f3e0b44c719cc6bc1638d544ac5ea82704a5ddd4a1427c7a11dd449ef8f8de968a441c25482bf1683d2460fd5014de733)
---
**5\. Are you happy with the current state of the economy?**| | ****[**Answer**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f3a316973557324e53d2102030335e3e9635d6ca529a69216ae825aceaeaffcb32339562b2c4b61b91b3ba2efddc369fd)****
---

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020

[TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260ffafa4ad64b505ee32c6e6e19333e361fa91217a532522bb07bc1ec891023474db6d8be205bd261721c4504920b1b349a)

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Donald J. Trump
**Subject:** ATTN: State of the Union Address
**To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f1819ac6a72b364eea4171ce05bd19bd2dc46219e6ba25d2eb63b75cdcb669aee730afac79aa0ac99c722c375f5fa71f3)**

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f9645733245d84482138fb72f12b37a601305fe95e973ccfbdcd3e4b82997f9dfdb383d864bea6b6a833a2e484ef7f570)
---

Friend,

On February 5th, I will stand before YOU, the citizens of this great nation, and give my second Official State of the Union Address as President.

Nancy & Chuck don't want me to speak, Mainstream Media outlets don't want me to speak, and the Hollywood Elites don't want me to speak.
| _**But I know, YOU want me to speak**_.
---

That's why, before I prepare my remarks, I want to hear from the ONLY people who can truly describe the state of our union -- YOU, the American people.

Last year, I used over 3OO,OOO Americans' survey responses to help me prepare for my State of the Union Address. I need your help again.

**[Please take the Official State of the Union Prep Survey before 11:59 PM TONIGHT so I can review your answers.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f1d664831a46b9a15806822bc1875080c045dafba6218932be8b6f73bee8d377ac2bd9d543558c6bd02da6b87f8eb3fd1)** | **[Official State of the Union Prep Survey](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260fd2f26b7af4cffbf119b79984be521b8cf0ae5776e9ed04984cb30e482d1118769d5002df4f048a515f8ea987c68ccc6b)**
---
**1\. Do you approve of the job done by President Donald J. Trump?**| | [Answer](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f007af623980f2c5ca5fc2a2e3b179a6fe3b9b1ccf803746e2cdf73d3fbe65b3308e632e3607bdc018060963f70dea4b3)
---
**2\. Do you believe the media has painted a false image of what 's happening at our Southern Border?**| | [Answer](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260fa5acee47fa64f697085412fb9e5766f6e1711aaecfd873d2638f1ce9d37ff62322326acaa7ed220d927e81eafa134b8d)
---
**3\. Do you think the media did a proper job of blaming Democrats for the Shutdown?**| | [Answer](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f8489b45b44d25c5591bc3609396b8eb1ac3822393f1e25be91524fc64611c650723e8f33b8178d0c0ef056c665d4861b)
---
**4\. Do you think news outlets should be held accountable for writing FALSE stories?**| | [Answer](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f3e0b44c719cc6bc1638d544ac5ea82704a5ddd4a1427c7a11dd449ef8f8de968a441c25482bf1683d2460fd5014de733)
---
**5\. Are you happy with the current state of the economy?**| | ****[**Answer**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f3a316973557324e53d2102030335e3e9635d6ca529a69216ae825aceaeaffcb32339562b2c4b61b91b3ba2efddc369fd)****
---
Before I give the most important State of the Union Address, in the history of our country, I need your help, Friend.

**[Please take the Official State of the Union Prep Survey before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to ensure your opinions about our GREAT nation will be included.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f1c396869ed1b0ca36580085b6a9506b7e43024656d15e69437ca2c78229637620f133c1362631f08d41e08eda6eb0815)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f9795ed01cddbeac2aa629727be3e1e3cf2c4655e4b81c78bbf16d3207f50d5c4b0c9cb29ecd0c21c19ac3130740067b7)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
[TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260f16ae876874b74e5fc4ee83f73363d8b26b5cc80f6116eb51e54ba05202a397299fdadafeaac1f6c00ebaf4714320e48f)

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d3b1f0c6625f260ff165e517a13ce8ae92e72c7432beb168600c86f0903d46b75ef9a3ca20c2a2ebbb2a7bfeee21b747f0c8a245bde2fe52) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fcd1a84d4d1880e7e3c85ab2faee7f44e446aaf6b0eb0b935fdbce43ba068082a25968b8d9791bee946a1fb7e92490ae2f7f1148bceab37f3a) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c58f9ff4aa737c1e95bed1569b7935dd2799cd94dc7da4d166cee3d36ca4e6a8e4e9724c1e0f85340)

name: Pamela Tucker
subject: FWD: Let's Get Started.
body:
Derek, **Did you see Stephen's first fundraising email on Monday?** As our Chairman prepares to go down to D.C. next week to work with his close allies and create new ones, he needs to showcase that New Hampshire Republicans are invested in our party. [By donating $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can contribute, we will demonstrate a great rush of energy with new donors adding their names to our donor list.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSJT1MitRgdR7oyYoQzY7nJA8wgHm9GOqs8aLV7PMNpD0_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MkjEFj8hcomfZqYHyyqQHlJRJzwpire3-2FzaimZA6xVbJSh236OfqlDRx9H4aP1Em9eF8X44hs0gBsHda5y2Q7RwAojaNRlZ9cyQPY6IsSab3LAIqmP-2BD0aztCYFj2BwlpH2ItzUYPVG3-2Fkbd0mydMkNg7sS5z07UhuyeHZniHiu46HlT53H8bxgZPymdBU3RJ8zb4I852eV5aKcEtj9-2FcDVclWGG-2BGNJINBUH6dixPX53omWEP7ETFp06mobykvOV6Khr6l5ouf4i0R39kyVE1w-3D-3D) The more donors we have from New Hampshire, the more interest we will see from D.C. [Chip in today!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSJT1MitRgdR7oyYoQzY7nJA8wgHm9GOqs8aLV7PMNpD0_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MkjEFj8hcomfZqYHyyqQHlJRJzwpire3-2FzaimZA6xVbJSh236OfqlDRx9H4aP1Em9eF8X44hs0gBsHda5y2Q7RyuyaEn-2FeYqbWJfOYB5WbONSoiJXTSCtViNpkrdK6WP8ipHpCBVjFCqhrLueTLaYcyAXu2Se5-2BTIxLostQd4Q6qS0xWWbIHxyjuGSLP45qgNZ21Zyr9GB4Jw8ff3jZvgfKnXO1DUiykTiOviZj0LXxZZTJ3I-2B5uNgXvjcXZ6zsZVcHluC4QC-2F1wkjadZMZ-2Ba6g-3D-3D) Sincerely, Pamela Tucker NHGOP Vice Chair \--- Derek, I am honored to be your new Chairman of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. We are hard at work at the NHGOP to re-establish and grow our organization, and as your Chairman I am committed to following through on what I told you all during the campaign:
We're going to raise money, raise some more money, and then raise even more money. I am heading to D.C. next week to build the relationships with key allies and organizations that can help the NHGOP succeed financially, but we need to show them that New Hampshire Republicans are willing invest in our State Republican Party. [By donating $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can contribute, you will increase our number of donors and show potential large investors that New Hampshire Republicans are serious about turning our state around in 2020.](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSJT1MitRgdR7oyYoQzY7nJA8wgHm9GOqs8aLV7PMNpD0_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MkjEFj8hcomfZqYHyyqQHlJRJzwpire3-2FzaimZA6xVbJSh236OfqlDRx9H4aP1Em9eF8X44hs0gBsHda5y2Q7RxIWUVju0xaf7DuvIelADqY-2BUNW79YYno-2Beb3dgYavk9PMtXWj1X7EexjE-2FylRgDdPqv0aT44PqqMHNe7l4blldH2KQJtVhgxBYRQUeak7vF-2BJ3XBp0DujmS4G2pLR0AjZtt4DIqlX32U1Xe4Q6divzsNP91yf0VeENhHmmJLSpMkFGzOuG8QOYFAamVVa6xeg-3D-3D) I know together that we can build a **NEW** New Hampshire Republican Party from the ground up. We will be investing in growing our grassroots, recruiting candidates **NOW** from State Representatives to the United States Senate. [With your early investment,](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSJT1MitRgdR7oyYoQzY7nJA8wgHm9GOqs8aLV7PMNpD0_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MkjEFj8hcomfZqYHyyqQHlJRJzwpire3-2FzaimZA6xVbJSh236OfqlDRx9H4aP1Em9eF8X44hs0gBsHda5y2Q7R6KzGFZlQdzbeqwrKhKLRRTg0ciC8w90DiCMqL-2FC0Sc-2FI4tmHWxIN-2BEjIA8WXBn4CO3C04rmEVB8Rc0Pg0W6Exxo52ALAZsq1gq-2B0kn7Qr7fshjiMBSj1gHpOVlNnV-2FsMJoHbS1BgxSz3oGOIiwa8P4-2BPx0ZOaGj5poUhWC7Qr6r4LNb3QZDj6G-2FcocR4zDiBg-3D-3D) we're going to build an NHGOP that will deliver the state of New Hampshire for President Donald Trump, re-elects Governor Chris Sununu, defeats Senator Jeanne Shaheen, and elects Republicans up and down the ballot in 2020. Thank you for your support. Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman
---

clean_body: Derek, Did you see Stephen's first fundraising email on Monday? As our Chairman prepares to go down to D.C. next week to work with his close allies and create new ones, he needs to showcase that New Hampshire Republicans are invested in our party. The more donors we have from New Hampshire, the more interest we will see from D.C. Sincerely, Pamela Tucker NHGOP Vice Chair \--- Derek, I am honored to be your new Chairman of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. We are hard at work at the NHGOP to re-establish and grow our organization, and as your Chairman I am committed to following through on what I told you all during the campaign: We're going to raise money, raise some more money, and then raise even more money. I am heading to D.C. next week to build the relationships with key allies and organizations that can help the NHGOP succeed financially, but we need to show them that New Hampshire Republicans are willing invest in our State Republican Party. I know together that we can build a NEW New Hampshire Republican Party from the ground up. We will be investing in growing our grassroots, recruiting candidates NOW from State Representatives to the United States Senate. we're going to build an NHGOP that will deliver the state of New Hampshire for President Donald Trump, re-elects Governor Chris Sununu, defeats Senator Jeanne Shaheen, and elects Republicans up and down the ballot in 2020. Thank you for your support. Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: K. Gillibrand
subject: Not a power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976914/2ae112ef/17aedf64/357a5bf4/1242909526/VEsH/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976914/2ae112ef/17aedf64/357a5bf4/1242909526/VEsE/ "https://2020.kirstengillibrand.com/")
Peter,
On the Senate floor this week, Mitch McConnell mocked - literally laughed - at the idea of making Election Day a federal holiday, calling it a Democratic "power grab."
Let's be clear: Expanding access to voting isn't a "power grab." Voting is the key to our entire system of representative government. **And it 's the responsibility of everyone who believes in democracy to make voting as accessible as possible. We can do it, through reforms that make Election Day a federal holiday, mail voting universal and voter registration automatic.**
It's time to stand up to Mitch McConnell and the powerful elites who restrict the right to vote. They'll continue to undermine our democracy unless we act, so I need you to join me in the fight to expand voting rights now.
**[Stand up to Mitch McConnell and add your name: Protect voting rights and ensure everyone can make their voice heard!](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://action.kirstengillibrand.com/protect-voting-rights?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2739-ja-nonabel-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.kirstengillibrand.com%2Fvoting-rights")**
We saw it in the openly racist, anti-youth voter suppression that took place in Florida, Georgia and North Dakota last year: Efforts to discriminate against voters and suppress votes are a direct threat to the very foundation of our democracy.
And let's be clear about the targets here, too. Republicans like Mitch McConnell deliberately want to make it harder for people to vote and have their voices heard. Their fear of being held accountable by people they expect to vote against them can never again be allowed to determine the outcome of an election.
If you believe that voting should always be equal, fair and accessible for everyone, I need you to add your name and join our fight today:
**[Click here to join me in fighting to protect the right to vote and ensuring every American has the opportunity to make their voice heard at the ballot box.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://action.kirstengillibrand.com/protect-voting-rights?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2739-ja-nonabel-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fact.kirstengillibrand.com%2Fvoting-rights")**
Your voice is your vote, and nothing is more important than protecting that. Thank you for joining this critical fight.
Kirsten
[DONATE](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976914/2ae112ef/17aedf64/357a5bf6/1242909526/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI3MzktamEtbm9uYWJlbC1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2739-ja-nonabel-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976914/2ae112ef/17aedf64/357a5bf1/1242909526/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Jason Yates
subject: My conversation with Michele Bachmann
body:
| | Peter, It’s Groundhog Day and Punxsutawney Phil is predicting the arrival of spring. To some, Groundhog Day takes on a different meaning, saying that it represents a situation in which a series of unwelcome or tedious events appears to be continually repeated. In a recent conversation I had with Congresswoman Michele Bachmann, she pointed out that even above political issues, there is one key cultural issue that Christians must take notice of before entire generations are affected. In many ways, the issue is our own Groundhog Day. It’s an unwelcome issue that is continually being repeated, but with growing intensity. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNBPCB9QNdUsaBuk2BmC054NKLd6eXpbxxpg1GOLhTOYDPL2DmM79zgtuIIO96TPxk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190202com01&n=1) The issue is not one many people are discussing, but since she laid out this concern, it has been something we’ve been thinking about at My Faith Votes: are we truly protecting our children? As Christians, and especially for us as parents, this is something we should undoubtedly ponder and then, do our part to act on to reverse this unfavorable cultural trend. Watch Bachmann’s powerful answer to this question and more, here: [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66icYcIyRhB2URpXghNXmPGvNBPCB9QNdUsaBuk2BmC054NKLd6eXpbxxpg1GOLhTOYDPL2DmM79zgtuIIO96TPxk&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190202com01&n=2) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190202com01&n=3)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190202com01&n=4).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190202com01&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190202com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190202com01&n=7)

In a recent conversation I had with Congresswoman Michele Bachmann, she pointed out that even above political issues, there is one key cultural issue that Christians must take notice of before entire generations are affected. In many ways, the issue is our own Groundhog Day. It’s an unwelcome issue that is continually being repeated, but with growing intensity. The issue is not one many people are discussing, but since she laid out this concern, it has been something we’ve been thinking about at My Faith Votes: are we truly protecting our children? name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
“We added 304,000 jobs, which was a shocker to a lot of people. It wasn't a shocker to me,” President Donald J. Trump said... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27ef7cc871&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump Policies Keep Economic Boom Going As Job Gains of 304,000 Surpass Expectations](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ba71ddc35&e=3ee4985eea)
-White House Council of Economic Advisers
“We added 304,000 jobs, which was a shocker to a lot of people. It wasn't a shocker to me,” President Donald J. Trump said yesterday about the January jobs report. With this week’s news, America’s economy continues its historic streak of job gains. January 2019 marks the 16th month in a row with employment growth of at least 100,000 new jobs.

**Watch** : [_“We hate to say we told you so...”_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bcfb183dd5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [U.S. Stocks Post Best January in 30 Years](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5593f53885&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
The strong U.S. economy fueled stocks to their best January performance in 30 years, Amrith Ramkumar reports. On top of that, the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 both closed with their biggest monthly gains of any month in more than 3 years, “lifted by renewed confidence that the U.S. economy will keep powering ahead.”
---
|
---
| [I've Fought Sex Trafficking as a DHS Special Agent – We Need To Build the Wall For The Children](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41baa3e727&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“As a former Department of Homeland Security (DHS) special agent on the southern border who fought sex trafficking for over a decade, I can say with certainty that the issue of the border wall should be not about power and partisan politics. It should be about the children – the tens of thousands of them who have been and are being trafficked into the U.S. and forced into the commercial sex trade,” writes Timothy Ballard, founder of the nonprofit Operation Underground Railroad.
---
|
---
| [Crisis at Our Southern Border Is Real and Growing Worse Without the Wall](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=beb9487989&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
Democrats “claim that a barrier or wall would do nothing to curb illegal immigration or drug smuggling, which is demonstrably untrue,” Buck Sexton writes. The crisis at our border is grave: “Human smugglers for the cartels use the surrender of family units as a diversionary tactic. Once Border Patrol is engaged in one area, the smugglers will use that opportunity to run drugs onto American soil.”

**Watch** : [President Trump’s message on the border wall](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2449109220&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Life Is Under Attack](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14984124cc&e=3ee4985eea)
-_National Review_
Vice President Mike Pence writes about a shocking bill introduced by Democrats in the Virginia legislature that would affirm abortion up to the moment of birth. But Gov. Ralph Northam (D-VA) went even further. “The infant would be kept comfortable. [And] the infant would be resuscitated if that’s what the mother and the family desired, and then a discussion would ensue,” the Governor said. “There’s another word for this: infanticide,” Vice President Pence writes.
---
|
---
| [Trump Administration Announces U.S. Withdrawal from INF Treaty](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ea8f001954&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Free Beacon_
“The Trump administration announced on Friday that the United States would withdraw from the Intermediate-Range Nuclear Forces (INF) Treaty because Russia continues to be in violation of the agreement,” Andrew Kugle writes. President Trump addressed Russia’s violation in a statement: “For far too long, Russia has violated the Intermediate-Range Nuclear Forces (INF) Treaty with impunity, covertly developing and fielding a prohibited missile system that poses a direct threat to our allies and troops abroad.”
---
|
---
| [Worker Wage Gains Just Broke 3% for the First Time in More Than 10 Years](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b0ae19bd89&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“Wages and salaries for American workers rose more than 3 percent over the past year, the first time that threshold has been broken in more than 10 years, according to a Labor Department report Thursday,” Jeff Cox reports. Average weekly earnings climbed 1.2 percent for the year in 2018.

**In the headlines** : [The Trump Economy stays hot in the new year](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=842c7efd01&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trump Hits Venezuela with New Sanctions as U.S. Steps Up Pressure On Maduro](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cb4d38a8ac&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“The Trump administration stepped up its pressure campaign on Venezuela’s socialist president Monday, hitting the country’s state-owned oil company with sanctions and calling on other nations to recognize opposition leader Juan Guaido as the legitimate interim president,” Dave Boyer reports. “The United States is holding accountable those responsible for Venezuela’s tragic decline,” Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin said.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be43d40607&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d8738eab29&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=5184121829)

On top of that, the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 both closed with their biggest monthly gains of any month in more than 3 years, “lifted by renewed confidence that the U.S. economy will keep powering ahead.” | | -Fox News “As a former Department of Homeland Security (DHS) special agent on the southern border who fought sex trafficking for over a decade, I can say with certainty that the issue of the border wall should be not about power and partisan politics. The crisis at our border is grave: “Human smugglers for the cartels use the surrender of family units as a diversionary tactic. But Gov. Ralph Northam (D-VA) went even further. “The infant would be kept comfortable. [And] the infant would be resuscitated if that’s what the mother and the family desired, and then a discussion would ensue,” the Governor said. “There’s another word for this: infanticide,” Vice President Pence writes. | | -The Washington Free Beacon “The Trump administration announced on Friday that the United States would withdraw from the Intermediate-Range Nuclear Forces (INF) Treaty because Russia continues to be in violation of the agreement,” Andrew Kugle writes. name: Our Revolution
subject: Sign up now - Medicare for All Week of Action!
body:
Senator Bernie Sanders and Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal are introducing historic Medicare for All legislation in the next few weeks and we are building the movement to support these revolutionary pol
# [](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a62f/bed43eb/9e6ffb18/75fbd37c/1615132240/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-header-OR")
Friends,
Senator Bernie Sanders and Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal are introducing historic Medicare for All legislation in the next few weeks and we are building the movement to support these revolutionary policies.
From February 9-13, thousands of us will gather at union halls, community centers, and schools across the country to talk about what is at stake in the fight for Medicare for All and what we can do.
**[Click here to join a National Medicare for All Week of Action event near you to hear more about the plan to win and what's next.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a62f/bed43eb/9e6ffb18/75fbd37f/1615132240/VEsE/ "https://medicare4all.org/actions/?source=OR")**
Medicare for All is now supported by a whopping 70% of all Americans. We have a real opportunity to pass this legislation, but it's going to take all of us to get it done.
[**Something this big has never been done before. Will you commit to joining us and the thousands of activists across the country at the barnstorm nearest you?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a62f/bed43eb/9e6ffb18/75fbd37f/1615132240/VEsF/ "https://medicare4all.org/actions/?source=OR")
It is up to us to push forward together and work to hold our representatives accountable. Thank you for joining us in this historic fight for health care justice.
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution
PS: Have you called your Representative in Congress yet to ask them to be an original co-sponsor of the bill? Call **202-858-1717** and enter your zip code to be connected to your U.S. House Congressional Representative. If your rep has already co-sponsored you will be transferred to Nancy Pelosi's Office.
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a62f/bed43eb/9e6ffb18/75fbd37e/1615132240/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a62f/bed43eb/9e6ffb18/75fbd379/1615132240/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a62f/bed43eb/9e6ffb18/75fbd378/1615132240/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a62f/bed43eb/9e6ffb18/75fbd37b/1615132240/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
